summary: Fantastic audience tape with solid performance and only minor wobble in the second set
review: Sammy rates this recording highly, praising its punchy sound and overall solid playing despite a few subtle wobble moments in the second set. The audience source captures the show well, making it a recommended listen for fans of vintage AUD tapes.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) notes strong performance and decent recording quality with minor issues, leading to a solid but not exceptional overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and punchy; slight wobble in the second set is barely noticeable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer describes overall performance as solid.
